Score.title: Score
Score.description: A typing test score achieved by a user.

uid.description: The unique identifier of the user who achieved the score.

displayName.description: The display name of the user.

photoURL.description: The profile picture URL of the user.

difficulty.description: The difficulty level of the test.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the score was recorded.

/scores/{scoreId}.description: A collection of all typing test scores.
